name: naby
description: Personalized persona agent desktop app — spike harness (Phase 0)

scripts.build:shell: npm run build:runtime && cd shell && npm run build:server && npm run build
scripts.build:app: npm run build:shell && npm run build:electron
scripts.spike:all: npm run spike:02 && npm run spike:03 && npm run spike:03b && npm run spike:04 && npm run spike:07 && npm run spike:f105 && npm run spike:f104 && npm run spike:f107 && npm run spike:f110
scripts.spike:nokeys: npm run spike:02 && npm run spike:03b && npm run spike:04 && npm run spike:07 && npm run spike:f105 && npm run spike:f104 && npm run spike:f107
scripts.spike:f104: npm run build:runtime && npm run build:electron && tsx src/spikes/spike-f104-credentials.ts
scripts.dist: npm run build:app && node scripts/build-dist.mjs --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:app && node scripts/build-dist.mjs --mac --publish never
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:app && node scripts/build-dist.mjs --win --publish never
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:app && node scripts/build-dist.mjs --linux --publish never
scripts.release: npm run build:app && node scripts/build-dist.mjs --publish always
